later_lugos_import.reason: Project-local candidate first; scripts, scaffolds, agents, and copied upstream files need L1 review before Bran custody.
required_before_import: Bind approval to the recorded upstream commit hash.
Decide whether to import original MIT upstream files or keep local distillations only.
Review helper scripts, scaffold assets, and agent YAML files before copying or execution.
